intro: Acorus calamus tincture, also known as calamus tincture, is a herbal extract made from the roots of the sweet flag plant (Acorus calamus). Traditionally used in herbal medicine, calamus tincture is believed to have carminative and anti-inflammatory properties, helping to soothe digestive issues and alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. However, it's essential to note that calamus tincture can be toxic in large quantities and should be used under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
